items.title: Contact Us

items.content:
Cancellation Policy

Orders or subscriptions can be cancelled based on eligibility and timing.

  • Cancellation requests must be submitted before order processing
  • Processed/delivered items may not be cancellable
  • Subscription cancellation applies from next billing cycle unless specified
items.title: Cancellation Policy

items.content:
Welcome to Wellness

Wellness is a digital platform focused on helping people build healthier habits through personalized coaching, simple tracking, and practical guidance.
items.title: About Us

items.content:
Privacy Policy

We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and secure your information.

Information We Collect

  • Account details (name, email, phone)
  • Usage and interaction data
  • Support communication details

How We Use Data

We use your data to provide services, improve user experience, and ensure platform security.
items.title: Privacy Policy

items.content:
Terms and Conditions

By using this platform, you agree to comply with these terms.

1. Use of Service

You must use the platform lawfully and responsibly.
items.title: Terms and Conditions

items.content:
Community Guidelines

Our community exists to support healthy, respectful conversations about wellness. By participating, you agree to follow these guidelines.

Be respectful

Treat coaches, staff, and fellow members with courtesy. Disagreement is fine; personal attacks are not.

No harassment or hate speech

We do not tolerate bullying, discrimination, threats, or content that targets individuals or groups.

Share responsibly

Personal experiences are welcome. Do not present unverified information as medical advice, and do not promote unsafe practices.

Protect privacy

Do not share another person’s personal details, photos, or private messages without consent.

Report concerns

If you see content that violates these guidelines, contact our support team. We may remove content or restrict accounts that break these rules.
items.title: Community Guideline

items.content:
Refund Policy

Refund requests are accepted within 7 days of eligible purchase unless otherwise stated.

Eligibility

  • Valid order proof required
  • Request submitted within policy window
  • No violation of platform terms

Approved refunds are processed within 5-10 business days.
items.title: Refund Policy
